comment.note:
Title: Language Vector 32 (Modified for CuerdOS)
Original Author: primefaces (Primeng Interface Icons) Original License: MIT License
Copyright (C) 2024 [PabloG-Dev / CuerdOS Project] SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later WITH exception-maybe
Source URL: https://www.svgrepo.com/svg/506518/language
Modification Details: This icon is a vector graphic from the Language 32 SVG collection. It has been modified and included in the CuerdOS GNU/Linux Installer project.
The original work was licensed under the MIT License. The CuerdOS project distributes this modified version under the GPLv3 license, compatible with the original MIT terms.
